items.description: Thirty element samples in labeled vials: iron, copper, tin, sulfur, silicon, carbon (graphite and diamond chip), aluminum, zinc, and more. Each labeled with atomic number, weight, and properties. Hold the building blocks of the universe in your hand. Some are shiny, some are dull, some are gas in sealed ampules.

items.name: Chemistry Tutoring -- Elements, Compounds & Reactions
items.description: One-on-one tutoring from the man who organized all of chemistry. I will teach you how elements combine, why some react violently and others are inert, and how the periodic table predicts it all. Bring your textbook questions. I wrote the textbook that started it all.

items.name: Pattern Recognition Seminar -- Finding Order in Chaos
items.description: Small group (max 4). Not just chemistry -- the skill of finding patterns in any dataset. I will give you messy data and teach you to sort, classify, and predict. The periodic table was a pattern recognition exercise. The same skill applies to business data, medical records, financial trends, or any complex system.

items.name: Braille Reading & Writing Workshop
items.description: Learn to read and write Braille. Six dots, 63 combinations, any language. In two hours you will write your name and read simple words by touch. Sighted people benefit too -- it sharpens tactile awareness and spatial thinking.

items.name: Braille Slate & Stylus Set (Professional)
items.description: Professional-grade Braille writing slate with interline spacing and a steel-tipped stylus. Write by punching dots right-to-left (they read left-to-right when flipped). Includes 50 sheets of Braille paper.

items.name: Accessibility Design Workshop -- Building for Everyone
items.description: Small group (max 5). Think about accessibility from the start, not as an afterthought. Blindfold exercises, navigation challenges, communication without sight. When you design for the most constrained user, you improve the experience for everyone. Curb cuts were designed for wheelchairs. Everyone uses them.

items.name: Organ Concert & Music Lesson (Beginner)
items.description: I was the organist at the Church of Saint-Nicolas-des-Champs in Paris. I also developed Braille music notation so blind musicians could read scores. This lesson covers basic organ technique and an introduction to reading music by touch.

items.name: Television History & Electronics Workshop
items.description: How I built the first electronic TV. Electron beams, phosphor screens, scanning patterns. We will build a simple cathode ray demonstration and understand how 525 lines of light become a moving picture.

items.name: Oscilloscope (Analog, Teaching Model)
items.description: Analog oscilloscope -- a cathode ray tube that draws electrical signals as visible waveforms. See your voice as a wave, see music as patterns. The oscilloscope is the engineer's eye.

items.name: Young Inventor Mentoring -- Potato Field to Patent
items.description: One-on-one mentoring for young inventors. I was 14 in a potato field. The vision comes first; the engineering follows. I will help you develop your idea, document it properly, and avoid the mistakes I made with investors and corporations.

items.name: Soldering & Circuit Building Workshop
items.description: Learn to solder, read circuit diagrams, and build a working electronic project. Through-hole components on perfboard. I built my first TV transmitter in a rented apartment. You will build something simpler but learn the same fundamental skill.

items.name: Interchangeable Parts Workshop -- Birth of Mass Production
items.description: Small group (max 4). Make identical parts using jigs and fixtures, then assemble them randomly. Any part fits any assembly. This is the foundation of all modern manufacturing.

items.name: Woodworking Jig & Fixture Building
items.description: Build a jig that produces identical parts every time. The jig transfers skill from craftsman to tool. A skilled worker makes one perfect piece. A jig lets anyone make a thousand.

items.name: Metal Filing & Fitting -- Hand Precision
items.description: Before machine tools, precision came from hand filing. File metal flat, square, and to dimension using a file, a square, and a surface plate. Patient, precise, and deeply satisfying.

items.name: Complete Filing Set (Swiss, 12-Piece)
items.description: Twelve Swiss-pattern files: flat, half-round, round, square, triangular, and knife -- in bastard and smooth cuts. Plus a file card for cleaning. Fundamental metalworking tools. With files and patience, you can make anything.

items.name: Ethics of Invention -- Second-Order Effects
items.description: The cotton gin was supposed to reduce labor. Instead it made slavery more profitable. Every invention has consequences the inventor did not intend. This seminar explores who benefits, who suffers, and how to think about responsibility.

items.name: Natural Selection Workshop -- Evolution in Action
items.description: Hands-on with specimens. Variation within species, selection pressure, adaptation. The fittest does not mean strongest -- it means best adapted. We examine bird beaks, shell shapes, and seed dispersal.

items.name: Specimen Collection Walk -- Observe Like Darwin
items.description: Guided nature walk focused on observation. Collect, label, and preserve specimens. My method: observe first, classify second, theorize third. Most people skip to theory. That is why most theories are wrong.

items.name: Dissecting Kit (Naturalist Grade)
items.description: Complete dissecting kit: scalpels, forceps, scissors, pins, dissecting tray, magnifier. The tools I used to study barnacles for eight years. Comparative anatomy reveals evolutionary relationships.

items.name: Scientific Journal Writing Workshop
items.description: Small group (max 4). Write clear, persuasive scientific papers. On the Origin of Species is 490 pages of meticulous evidence before a single bold claim. Build your case like a lawyer. Present it like a storyteller.

items.name: Greenhouse Access (Orchid & Carnivorous Plants)
items.description: My greenhouse collection: orchids, carnivorous plants (sundews, Venus flytraps), and climbing plants. Observe adaptation in real time. The sundew catches insects with sticky tendrils. The orchid mimics a female wasp. Nature is more creative than any engineer.

items.name: Data Visualization Workshop -- Make Numbers Speak
items.description: I invented the polar area diagram to show Parliament that soldiers died from bad sanitation. Numbers in a table are ignorable. Numbers in a picture are undeniable. Bring your data. Leave with a visual argument.

items.name: First Aid & Wound Care Training
items.description: Wound cleaning, bandaging, splinting, infection prevention. Tip: Wash your hands. In 1854, army surgeons did not wash between patients. I made them. The death rate dropped 40 percent. Hygiene is not optional.

items.name: Hospital Sanitation Audit Toolkit
items.description: Checklist-based audit kit for any care facility: hand hygiene stations, ventilation, waste disposal, linen management, water quality. The same methodology I used at Scutari.

items.name: Statistical Analysis for Beginners
items.description: One-on-one tutoring. First woman elected to the Royal Statistical Society. Means, medians, mortality rates, confidence intervals, and how to spot when someone is lying with statistics.

items.name: Healthcare Leadership -- Fighting Bureaucracy
items.description: Small group (max 5). How to reform a system from within. Build alliances, collect irrefutable data, present visually, lobby relentlessly, and never take no from someone who lacks the authority to say yes.

items.name: Quantum Mechanics for Non-Physicists
items.description: Two-hour session. Superposition, uncertainty, wave-particle duality, entanglement using analogies and demonstrations. Quantum mechanics is strange but the most precisely tested theory in science. Your phone uses it.

items.name: Double-Slit Experiment Kit (Laser & Detector)
items.description: Laser pointer, precision double slit, screen, and single-photon detector. Fire photons one at a time through two slits. They create an interference pattern as if each photon went through both slits. This will break your intuition. Good.

items.name: Philosophy of Science Seminar -- What Can We Know
items.description: Small group (max 5). The uncertainty principle is epistemology. What does it mean to measure? What does it mean to know? Bohr, Einstein, Bell -- the arguments are unresolved. The questions are eternal.

items.name: Advanced Physics Tutoring -- Quantum Theory
items.description: One-on-one. Schrodinger equation, matrix mechanics, perturbation theory, angular momentum. Prerequisite: calculus and linear algebra. Not easy. But beautiful.

items.name: Sterile Technique Workshop -- Infection Prevention
items.description: Hands-on aseptic technique: surgical scrub, gloving, draping, instrument sterilization, wound cleaning. Before carbolic acid, half of surgical patients died from infection. Surgeons operated in frock coats stiff with dried blood.

items.name: Surgical Instrument Set (Educational, Stainless)
items.description: Educational surgical instruments: scalpel handles, forceps, scissors, needle holders, retractors, hemostats. Stainless steel, autoclavable. For anatomy study and dissection practice.

items.name: History of Medicine -- From Barbarism to Antisepsis
items.description: Surgery before and after germ theory. Sawing limbs without anesthesia, 50 percent mortality. Then Pasteur, carbolic acid, sterile technique. A single idea -- germs cause infection -- saved more lives than any drug. Semmelweis figured it out before me and they drove him to madness.

items.name: Microscopy Workshop -- Seeing Germs
items.description: Hands-on microscopy. Prepare slides, stain bacteria, observe microorganisms that cause infection. My father improved the microscope lens. I used the improved microscope to see what was killing surgical patients. One generation builds the tool, the next uses it.

items.name: Evidence-Based Practice -- Convince the Skeptics
items.description: Small group (max 5). Introduce new practices into resistant institutions. Collect before-and-after data, present clearly, find early adopters, publish results, and never argue with ego -- argue with mortality rates.

items.name: Sofia's Birthday Cookie Box (Custom Order)
items.description: I bake custom cookie boxes for birthdays, parties, or just because. Choose 12 shapes, I bake them fresh with Sicilian ingredients. Vanilla, chocolate chip, or lemon zest flavors. 48 hours notice.

media.alt_text: Sofia's Birthday Cookie Box - fresh baked cookies

listings.notes: 12 cookies per box. Custom shapes. Message me your theme and I'll bake it fresh.

items.name: Baking with Sally -- Learn to Make Sicilian Cookies
items.description: I've been baking Sicilian cookies for 20 years. Amaretti, biscotti, chocolate chip -- the real recipes, not the shortcut ones. My kitchen, my rules, my playlist. 2 hours. You bring the appetite, I bring the flour. Currently mentoring Sofia Ferretti -- she's 17 and already better than me at biscotti.

media.alt_text: Baking with Sally - hands-on cookie workshop

listings.notes: 2 hour minimum. Flour, sugar, eggs included. You take home what you bake.

items.story: Baking is chemistry AND love. I teach because someone taught me. Sofia is my first apprentice -- she burned 6 cookies on day one. That's how you learn.

items.name: Bug Hunting Workshop -- Find Bugs Like a Pro
items.description: I'll teach you how to find bugs in web apps. Manual testing, exploratory testing, writing test cases. 3-hour workshop. Bring your laptop and a sharp eye. We'll break things together.

media.alt_text: Bug Hunting Workshop - QA testing session

listings.notes: 3-hour minimum. We test real apps. You leave knowing how to write a proper bug report.

items.name: QA Test Plan Template Kit
items.description: My collection of test plan templates, checklists, and bug report forms. ISTQB-aligned. Used in 20+ projects. Digital download -- you get the full kit as a ZIP file.

media.alt_text: QA Test Plan Template Kit - organized testing documents

listings.notes: One-time purchase. Includes test plan, test case templates, bug report form, regression checklist.

items.story: I built this kit over 8 years of testing. Every template was born from a project that needed better structure. Now you can skip the learning curve.

items.name: SAP Migration Deep Dive -- 1-Hour Consultation
items.description: 20 years of SAP PI/PO, CPI, and integration architecture in one hour. Bring your spaghetti diagrams, I'll untangle them. No PowerPoints -- whiteboard only. If I can't find the root cause in 60 minutes, the session is free. Spoiler: I always find it.

media.alt_text: SAP Migration Deep Dive -- 1-Hour Consultation - whiteboard session

listings.notes: 1-hour session. Whiteboard only. If I can't find the root cause, it's free.

items.name: MacBook Pro 16" M3 Max -- Digital Nomad Ready
items.description: The laptop that built BorrowHood. 36GB RAM, 1TB SSD, loaded with dev tools. Comes with charger, USB-C hub, and a stern warning not to install Windows on it. Daily rate includes a free judgmental look if you use it for spreadsheets.

media.alt_text: MacBook Pro 16" M3 Max -- Digital Nomad Ready - laptop on desk

listings.notes: Comes with charger and USB-C hub. No Windows installations please.

items.name: Camping Gear Bundle -- MAX Essentials Kit
items.description: Everything you need for off-grid Sicilian living: 2-burner stove, pots, sleeping bag (rated to 5C), headlamp, first aid kit, and a Swiss army knife that's seen more countries than most passports. The sleeping bag smells like freedom and slightly like diesel.

media.alt_text: Camping Gear Bundle -- MAX Essentials Kit - camping equipment spread out

listings.notes: Full kit for off-grid Sicilian living. Sleeping bag rated to 5C.

items.name: Whiskey & Code Night -- Pair Programming on the Rooftop
items.description: Friday nights at Baglio Xiare. Bring your laptop and a bug you can't fix. I bring the Lagavulin and 20 years of debugging wisdom. We solve your problem or we drink until it doesn't matter anymore. Either way, you leave with a story. Max 4 developers per session.

media.alt_text: Whiskey & Code Night -- Pair Programming on the Rooftop - evening coding session

listings.notes: Friday nights at Baglio Xiare. Max 4 developers. Lagavulin included.

items.name: Aerial Photography & Video -- Weddings, Real Estate, Events
items.description: Licensed EU drone pilot with 500+ flight hours over Western Sicily. 4K cinematic footage, edited same-day for real estate, next-week for weddings (because weddings are complicated, like the families involved). Includes raw files, color-graded edit, and a highlight reel. Insurance covered -- learned that lesson the hard way.

media.alt_text: Aerial Photography & Video -- drone flying over Sicilian coastline

listings.notes: Licensed EU pilot. 4K footage. Includes raw files and color-graded edit. Insurance covered.

items.name: Drone Pilot License Prep Course (EU A1/A3)
items.description: 8-hour intensive course over 2 days. Theory + 4 hours stick time on a training drone. Pass rate: 94%. The other 6% tried to fly inverted on day one. Includes study materials, practice exam, and one 'oh God oh God' moment per student (mandatory).

media.alt_text: Drone Pilot License Prep Course -- training session with drone

listings.notes: 8-hour intensive over 2 days. Theory + 4 hours stick time. 94% pass rate.

items.name: Drone Repair & Tune-Up Service
items.description: Props chipped? Gimbal wobbling? Camera fogged? Bring it in. I fix DJI, Autel, and FPV builds. Diagnostics free, parts at cost, labor EUR 40/hour. If your drone hit a seagull, add EUR 20 for the therapy I'll need after seeing the footage.

media.alt_text: Drone Repair & Tune-Up Service -- drone components on workbench

listings.notes: DJI, Autel, FPV builds. Diagnostics free, parts at cost.

items.name: Fiat Ducato Camper Van (Sleeps 4, Kitchen, Solar)
items.description: 2019 Ducato, professionally converted. Sleeps 4 (if two of you are short), full kitchen, 200W solar, outdoor shower. Unlimited km in Sicily. Comes with a Camper & Tour emergency number and my father Sebastino's blessing, which in Sicily is basically insurance.

media.alt_text: Fiat Ducato Camper Van -- parked at Sicilian coastline

listings.notes: Sleeps 4, full kitchen, 200W solar, outdoor shower. Unlimited km in Sicily.

items.name: Camping Trip Planning -- Hidden Gems of Western Sicily
items.description: I grew up in these roads. Tell me how many days and what you like -- beaches, ruins, wine, or all three -- and I'll plan your route with campsites, wild spots (shh), best restaurants, and fuel stops. Includes offline maps and my personal phone number for when you inevitably get lost in Segesta at sunset.

media.alt_text: Camping Trip Planning -- scenic road through Western Sicily

listings.notes: Custom route planning for Western Sicily. Includes offline maps and my phone number.

items.name: Hand-Knitted Sicilian Shawl (Custom Colors & Patterns)
items.description: Made by these hands for 65 years. Choose your colors and pattern -- traditional Sicilian, modern geometric, or 'surprise me Rosa.' Takes 2-3 weeks. Each shawl comes with a tag that says who made it and a lifetime guarantee, because I plan to outlive everyone in this neighborhood.

media.alt_text: Hand-Knitted Sicilian Shawl -- colorful knitted textile

listings.notes: Custom colors and pattern. 2-3 weeks production. Lifetime guarantee from Rosa.

items.story: Made by these hands for 65 years. Every stitch carries a prayer and a story. My grandmother taught me, I taught my daughters, and now the shawls travel the world while I stay in Trapani.

items.name: Nonna Rosa's Babysitting -- Ages 2-10, Snacks Included
items.description: I raised 6 children and 14 grandchildren. None of them went to prison. That's my resume. Your kids will eat homemade biscotti, learn three Sicilian words (one of them rude), and come home tired enough to sleep through the night. No tablets, no TV -- just stories, games, and a garden full of lizards to chase.

media.alt_text: Nonna Rosa's Babysitting -- garden with toys and biscotti

listings.notes: Ages 2-10. Homemade biscotti included. No tablets, no TV. Just stories and lizards.

items.name: Website Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 Compliance)
items.description: I break websites for a living. Give me your URL, I'll give you a 40-page report on every accessibility violation, with screenshots, severity ratings, and fix suggestions. Screen reader tested, keyboard-only tested, color contrast tested. If your site passes on the first try, I'll refund you -- but nobody passes on the first try.

media.alt_text: Website Accessibility Audit -- screen showing WCAG compliance report

listings.notes: Full WCAG 2.1 audit. 40-page report with screenshots and fix suggestions.

items.name: User Testing Session -- Real Feedback, No Mercy
items.description: 1-hour session where I use your app like a real human who hasn't read your documentation. Screen recorded, think-aloud protocol, timestamped notes. I'll find the UX pain points your team is too polite to mention. Includes a written report with 'Things That Made Me Want to Close the Tab' section. Constructive, but honest.

media.alt_text: User Testing Session -- person testing app on laptop with notes

listings.notes: 1-hour session. Screen recorded, think-aloud protocol, timestamped notes and written report.

items.name: Designer Sunglasses Collection -- Ray-Ban, Gucci, Prada
items.description: Premium sunglasses for rent. Perfect for beach days, weddings, or looking important at cafes. All authentic (wink). Cash preferred, no receipts needed. Return policy: flexible. Questions about serial numbers: unnecessary.

media.alt_text: Designer Sunglasses Collection -- assorted premium sunglasses display

listings.notes: Cash preferred. Return policy: flexible. Questions about serial numbers: unnecessary.

items.name: Johnny's Delivery Bike (Broken -- Needs Repair)
items.description: My delivery bike. 26-inch mountain bike, panniers on both sides, can carry 15kg of goods. Problem: chain snaps every two weeks, frame is bent from a pothole on Via Fardella. I've fixed it 6 times already. If someone has a welder or knows bikes, I'd trade cleaning services for a proper repair. This bike is my business.

media.alt_text: Mountain bike with delivery panniers

listings.notes: Not for rent -- listed because I need help fixing it. Will trade cleaning services for bike repair. The frame needs welding and the chain needs replacing. Again.

items.name: Local Delivery Service -- Trapani Centro
items.description: I deliver anything that fits in my bike panniers (when the bike works) or I carry it on foot. Groceries, packages, bakery orders, documents. I know every street in Trapani centro -- every shortcut, every one-way street, every doorbell code that doesn't work. Same-day delivery within the old town. For bigger loads or when the bike is broken (often), I walk. Still faster than the post office.

media.alt_text: Local delivery service in old town streets

listings.notes: EUR 5 per delivery within Trapani centro. EUR 8 to Bonagia or Erice bassa. EUR 12 to the port area. Heavier than 10kg = EUR 3 extra. I'll confirm pickup time by Telegram. Usually within 2 hours.

items.name: Electric Scooter (Used -- Perfect for Deliveries)
items.description: Used Xiaomi electric scooter, 30km range, perfect for local deliveries. Bought it for Johnny but listing it as a rental so he builds credit on the platform. EUR 5/day or EUR 25/week.

listings.description: Electric scooter for local deliveries. 30km range, lightweight, easy to ride. Perfect for Trapani centro.

media.alt_text: Electric scooter for urban delivery
Electric scooter parked on Mediterranean street

teams.invite_message: Marco gestisce il mio profilo. Senza di lui non sarei qui.
Luna photographs my baked goods for the listings. She makes them look even better than they taste.

mentorships.goal: Master 10 cookie recipes from Sally's collection. Bake for the neighborhood market.
mentorships.notes: Sofia got Sally's cookie cutter set for her birthday. Natural talent. Eager learner. Sally's note: Just ping me on Telegram if you get stuck. I recommend butter for the cookbook recipes but you can always use virgin olive oil of course.

mentorships.goal: Get licensed for basic drone delivery flights within Scopello.
mentorships.notes: Uncle Pietro wants to teach Sofia drone delivery. Waiting for her to turn 18.

mentorships.goal: Learn neighborhood delivery routes. Help Johnny with his rounds.
mentorships.notes: Johnny's bike is broken. Sofia could help with deliveries on foot until the scooter arrives.
